mapper.select: SELECT * FROM device ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM device WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM device WHERE model_id = #{modelId} ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM device WHERE model_id = #{modelId} AND project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM device WHERE device_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT * FROM device WHERE device_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM device WHERE model_id = #{modelId} AND device_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY update_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalCount, COUNT(IF(device_status = 'online', 1, NULL)) AS onlineCount, COUNT(IF(device_status = 'offline', 1, NULL)) AS offlineCount, COUNT(IF(device_status = 'repairing', 1, NULL)) AS repairingCount FROM device WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device ( device_name, device_code, device_model, device_type, device_status, model_id, project_id, device_description, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{deviceName}, #{deviceCode}, #{deviceType}, #{deviceType}, #{deviceStatus}, #{modelId}, #{projectId}, #{deviceInfo}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE device SET device_name = #{deviceName}, device_code = #{deviceCode}, device_model = #{deviceType}, device_type = #{deviceType}, device_status = #{deviceStatus}, model_id = #{modelId}, project_id = #{projectId}, device_description = #{deviceInfo}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
